evidence.claim: Rebuilt candidate-JD matching pipeline, improving NDCG@10 from 0.72 to 0.91
evidence.source_text: rebuilt the candidate-JD matching pipeline from scratch, taking it from 0.72 to 0.91 NDCG@10

evidence.claim: Built RAG-based ranking pipeline serving 50M+ queries per month
evidence.source_text: Built a RAG-based ranking pipeline serving 50M+ queries per month

evidence.claim: Used BM25, BGE embeddings, FAISS HNSW, and LLM-based re-rankers
evidence.source_text: The architecture combined BM25 + dense retrieval (BGE embeddings, FAISS HNSW) with an LLM-based re-ranker

evidence.claim: Designed offline evaluation framework (NDCG, MRR, recall@K)
evidence.source_text: Designed the offline evaluation framework from scratch — NDCG, MRR, recall@K calibrated against online A/B engagement metrics.

evidence.claim: Led a team of 4 engineers across a system rollout
evidence.source_text: Led a team of 4 engineers across the rollout.

evidence.claim: Reduced p95 retrieval latency by 60% and improved NDCG@10 by 18%
evidence.source_text: The new system reduced p95 retrieval latency by 60% while improving NDCG@10 by 18% on our held-out eval set.

evidence.claim: Migrated semantic search system for 35M+ items
evidence.source_text: Owned the design and rollout of a large-scale semantic search system serving an internal corpus of 35M+ items.

evidence.claim: Holds Google Cloud Professional ML Engineer certification
evidence.source_text: Google Cloud Professional ML Engineer (Google Cloud, 2021)

evidence.claim: Strong opinions on trade-offs between LLMs and classical IR
evidence.source_text: I have strong opinions about when LLMs are the right hammer and when classical IR is — usually it's both.

evidence.claim: Experience with incremental index refresh and embedding drift monitoring
evidence.source_text: Spent substantial time on the boring-but-critical parts: incremental index refresh, embedding drift monitoring, online/offline metric correlation.
